first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are nearly identical in their reasoning, despite the shift in dates making the candidate appear older. Both versions receive the same score (4/10) and correctly identify the same core skills gap: a lack of experience in SoC/IP modeling and AI accelerator hardware, which are central to the role. The minor differences in phrasing for strengths and concerns are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect a change in the fundamental assessment of the candidate's qualifications.
